description: Christmas bear music box figurine — mechanical repair and cleaning and refresh.
itemDetails:
Christmas bear music box figurines are part of holiday giftware traditions that became especially common from the late 20th century onward. These pieces were sold through card shops, seasonal home-decor retailers, and collectible Christmas catalog lines.

They are often polyresin or ceramic with a small internal wind-up musical movement and painted holiday detailing. Value is usually decorative rather than rare-collector level, but complete and working music box mechanisms help retain interest for seasonal display buyers.
